calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Nov-10-2009 Vacated

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-10-2009 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar for an Unlawful Detainer Settlement Conference.
Judge Pro Tem: Russell Davis; Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha; Not Reported. (Dept. 304B).
Appearances:
Francisco Torres, Esq. special appearance for the plaintiff Caritas Management Corp. , represented by Magali Echevarria.
Tyler Macmillan, Esq., through limited scope, for and with the Defendant Lynn Fuller.
The Judge Pro Tem, litigants and counsel confer privately for settlement discussions.
Case settled, parties enter into a signed agreement "Stipulation for Possession of Premises", which was filed, but not read into the record.
TRIAL DATE VACATED.
